title: AFI UWR Decay KAT Vectors v0 (Testnet-Provisional DRAFT)
description: DRAFT / NON-IMPLEMENTATION schema for the applyTimeDecay known-answer-test (KAT) vector file of the version-pinned UWR profile uwr-weighted-lifts-v0.1 (UP-7, UP-11). Vectors are PURE DATA over the pinned GreeksDecayTemplate v1 surface; nothing in afi-config executes the decay function. KAT execution against afi-core code is the separately-authorized PR-UWR-KAT-EXEC. Decay-engine canonicality remains OPEN and deferred to PR-7 (UP-8). All values testnet-provisional, not production scoring law.
$comment: Authorized by afi-governance/decisions/uwr-profile-pin-v0.1.md UP-12 (PR-UWR-CONFIG only). Every vector's elapsedMinutes is enum-pinned to an integer multiple of its template's halfLifeMinutes, so with dyadic base scores every expected value is exact in decimal and IEEE-754 binary64 — no comparison tolerance is needed or defined here.
x-afiPartOf: AFI version-pinned UWR profile registry (uwr-profile-pin-v0.1, PR-UWR-CONFIG)
x-afiDoctrineRefs: afi-governance/decisions/uwr-profile-pin-v0.1.md — UP-7 decay template set pin, UP-8 canonicality deferral, UP-11 KAT/golden gate
afi-governance/decisions/math-authority-v0.1.md §3 and §8 — KAT vectors live in afi-config; PR-7 reserved slot for afi-core decay delegation to afi-math

x-afiOpenItems.UP-8: Which decay engine is canonical (GreeksDecayTemplate.applyTimeDecay vs validators/SignalDecay.ts) is OPEN, deferred to PR-7. These vectors pin the GreeksDecayTemplate surface only.
x-afiOpenItems.thetaBias: Declared but not consumed by any computation; recorded with thetaBiasConsumed: false. Behavior is NOT pinned.

x-afiStatus.description: Artifact lifecycle marker carried on the document itself per UP-12.

description.description: OPTIONAL free-form commentary on the vector set.

canonicalityNote.const: Decay-engine canonicality is OPEN and deferred to PR-7 (math-authority-v0.1.md §8); this file pins the GreeksDecayTemplate surface only (UP-8).

templates.description: The pinned GreeksDecayTemplate v1 template set (UP-7). thetaBias values are declared-but-not-consumed; thetaBiasConsumed is pinned false.

exactnessRule.const: elapsedMinutes is always an integer multiple of halfLifeMinutes and baseScore is dyadic, so every expected value equals baseScore * 2^-k exactly in decimal and IEEE-754 binary64; no comparison tolerance is defined in this file (PR-UWR-KAT-EXEC owns comparison policy).
